title: Jaju Babu to be new Advocate General of Kerala; T Asaf Ali will be Director General of Prosecution
description: Senior Advocate Jaju Babu will be the new Advocate General (AG) of Kerala and advocate T Asaf Ali will be the Director General of Prosecution (DGP) for the State.Newly sworn-in Chief Minister VD Satheesan announced the same on Monday.Babu will succeed Senior Advocate K Gopalakrishnan Kurup, who served as the Advocate General during the previous Left Democratic Front (LDF) government.Ali, who is also a Congress leader, will take up the post that was previously occupied by Senior Advocate TA Shaji
